blur_detection.description: The text and edges are moderately blurred, likely due to camera shake.
blur_detection.recommendation: Retake the image with a steadier hand or use a tripod.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is slightly low, but still legible.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Improve lighting conditions to enhance contrast.

glare_identification.description: Minor glare is present in the top-right corner, affecting a small portion of the text.
glare_identification.recommendation: Adjust the angle of the camera to avoid direct light reflection.

water_stains.description: No water stains are detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears or folds are present on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the bottom edge is slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections are detected on the document.

obstructions.description: No obstructions are present on the document.

classification.error_type: File identified not as an expense
classification.error_message: The document does not contain sufficient fields to be classified as an expense.
classification.reasoning: The document contains some numerical values and possible dates, but it lacks critical fields such as supplier, consumer recipient, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, and item description/line items. Therefore, it does not meet the criteria for being classified as an expense document.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document lacks the necessary fields to be identified as an expense document. Only numerical values and possible dates are present, but no clear expense-related information is provided.

issues.description: Restaurant expense exceeds the maximum tax-exempt limit of NT 3,000 per month
issues.recommendation: Amounts above NT 3,000 will be subject to tax
issues.knowledge_base_reference: The upper tax exempted limit of monthly meal allowance per person (including Overtime meals) is NT 3,000. Amounts above this limit will be subject to tax

issues.recommendation: Please provide itemized report along with clear receipts
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Expense submission must have itemized report along with clear receipts

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has multiple compliance issues including missing mandatory fields, incomplete information, and tax implications. The restaurant expense exceeds the tax-exempt limit, and additional documentation is required for reimbursement.
